title: Iranian Insurance Market: Earned Premium, Incurred Loss & Loss Ratio
notes: Genuinely new category for this project: whole-market insurance premiums/losses. 13-year series built from 5 overlapping annual-report editions; multiple editions per year kept (not reconciled) where they differ slightly.

title: Iranian Insurance Market: Direct Premium Written & Growth Rate
Iranian Insurance Market: Premium & Loss by Insurance Class (Fire, Motor, Health, etc.)
notes: Two 2-year clusters, not continuous. Class naming/grouping shifts between editions, preserved as printed.

title: Iranian Insurance Market: Sales Network (Companies, Branches, Brokers, Agents, Policies, Claims)
Iranian Insurance Companies by Ownership Type (State vs. Private) & Employment
notes: Shows the market's privatization trajectory: 4 state/15 private in 1385 to 1 state/26 private by 1391.

title: Bimeh Markazi Iran (Reinsurer) Own Financial Highlights
notes: The reinsurer's own balance sheet/P&L, not whole-market data -- roughly 1/3 the scale of the whole market's premium figures, see README caveat.

title: GDP & Sectoral Value-Added Share by Province (Agriculture, Mining, Industry, Services)
notes: Adds provincial-breakdown depth (31 provinces + national total) to WDI's national-only GDP concept; WDI carries no subnational GDP series for Iran at all. Combines 2 overlapping SCI yearbook editions, both kept.

title: Non-Oil GDP Per Capita by Province
Government Current & Capital Budget Execution Share by Province
notes: Complements this project's national-level Majlis budget-law series with a provincial spending-distribution breakdown.

title: Financial Markets Indicators by Province (Bank Loan/Deposit Ratio, Insurance Premium/Claims/Per-Capita)
notes: Directly complements the national-level Bimeh Markazi insurance series with a provincial breakdown of premium/claims share and per-capita premium.

title: Industrial Production Value & Workshop Count Share by Province (10+ Employee Workshops)
Value of Mine Production Share by Province
notes: Complements iran_mining_series/ (commodity-based, national-level) with a geographic breakdown.

title: Foreign Investment Value by Province
notes: 1401-1402 rows dropped -- source shows literal placeholder '000' for those years (data not yet available at publication), not real zeros.

title: Iran National Energy Balance Sheet: Production, Supply & Consumption by Fuel Type and Sector
notes: Newly extracted from a 596pp Ministry of Energy report's retrospective annex. Full national energy balance by 8-9 fuel carriers (oil, gas, coal, renewables, hydro, solar/wind, nuclear from 1390, electricity) and by end-use sector -- no equivalent multi-fuel balance-sheet concept elsewhere in this project (WDI's EG.EGY.PRIM.PP is an intensity ratio, not a physical balance).

title: Iran Oil Production & Exports, Quarterly (CBI)
notes: Adds quarterly granularity (vs. OWID's annual) plus an export series (OWID/most sources only carry production) and an Iranian-calendar crosswalk.

title: Natural Gas Consumption: Flared, Delivered to NIGC, Injection
Oil Product Imports by Type (Motor Spirit, Kerosene, Gas Oil, Aviation Spirit)
notes: Shows Iran's gasoline-import dependence emerging post-1380 while kerosene/diesel imports collapse to zero as domestic refining catches up.

title: National Petrochemical Company Production by Category
Iran Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI), Whole Economy, Monthly with 13-Component Breakdown
notes: The only genuinely high-frequency, forward-looking Iranian economic indicator in this database -- almost everything else is annual. ISM/S&P-Global-style methodology, 50=no-change threshold.

title: Iran Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) by Manufacturing Sub-Sector (13 sectors)
notes: Rubber & plastics, petroleum & gas products, textiles, machinery & appliances, non-metallic minerals, basic metals, food, chemicals, wood/paper/furniture, motor vehicles, apparel & leather, other manufacturing, plus the Manufacturing-sector aggregate. Genuinely granular real-time sectoral data, first of its kind in this project.

title: Iran PMI Whole Economy, Monthly Bulletins (Seasonally-Adjusted & Not), Recent Months
notes: Picks up close to where the FY1403 yearbook series ends (real ~7-month gap in between, not filled). Adds seasonally-adjusted cut not present in the yearbook table. Includes a striking data point: headline PMI collapsed to 22-25 in Esfand 1404, by far the lowest reading in either PMI file.

title: Iran National Business Environment Monitoring Index (Annual & Quarterly)
notes: Worse-is-higher 1-10 survey-based obstacle index. Only 8 clean tabulated points extracted; source also has a ~36-quarter chart back to 1396 not individually digit-read (see README).

title: MIMT Daily Bulletin: Permits, Licenses & E-Commerce Transaction Panel (5 days)
notes: Thin, honestly-disclosed: 5 real single-day operational/administrative observations (permits, licenses, e-signatures, industrial-park land contracts), not a macro time series. Numbers required visual re-verification -- pdftotext digit-corrupted this specific source (see README).

title: Iran UNIDO Competitive Industrial Performance (CIP) Index, Rank & 8 Sub-Indicators
notes: UNIDO's composite industrial-competitiveness rank/score (out of 135-144 countries, denominator grows each year) plus MVA-per-capita, export-per-capita, tech-share, and world-share sub-indicators -- not otherwise in this database (WDI's manufacturing-VA-share-of-GDP is a component but the composite CIP score itself is additive).

title: UNIDO Competitive Industrial Performance (CIP) Rank & Score, Iran vs. Regional Economies
notes: Israel, Turkey, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Kazakhstan, Qatar, Iran, Egypt. See README for a source-side country-label note (one row labeled per IRI official terminology, neutral common-name column added).

title: IMIDRO Subsidiary Production Performance vs. Budget vs. Plan (Steel, Copper, Aluminum, Coal, Iron Ore)
notes: Fills the gap between the Pahlavi-era USGS series (ending 1980) and the previously-registered 2002/03 and 2021/22 IMIDRO snapshots (see iran_mining_capacity_growth_since_2002).

title: IMIDRO Subsidiary Sales & Export Volume/Value by Industrial Group
notes: Includes a documented source-side unit-labeling inconsistency between two IMIDRO annual-report editions for the same underlying export figures -- both preserved, see README.

title: Iran Southern Ports: Terminal Handling Charge (THC) per Container
notes: Standard internationally-comparable port-cost benchmark. Task originally targeted cargo-throughput statistics (unrecoverable, see README) -- this is an honest adjacent substitute: cost not volume.

title: Iran Southern Ports: Ship Port Dues per Gross Tonnage (Commercial vs. Tanker)
Iran Southern Ports: Progressive Container Storage/Demurrage Charges by Dwell Time
